theme: 5 mistakes HR makes planning corporate events

linkedin.text:
After producing 200+ corporate events, here are the 5 mistakes we see HR teams make every time:

❌ Mistake #1: Choosing the destination before defining the goal
The best event starts with WHY, not WHERE.

❌ Mistake #2: Booking the cheapest option
Your team will remember a bad experience longer than a good one.

❌ Mistake #3: Overloading the agenda
Downtime isn't wasted time — it's where real connections happen.

❌ Mistake #4: Ignoring dietary and cultural needs
One overlooked allergy can overshadow three perfect days.

❌ Mistake #5: DIY-ing it to "save money"
The hours your team spends planning = hidden costs that dwarf a professional's fee.

The companies with the best events? They don't plan events.
They partner with people who live and breathe them.

📩 alon@upe.co.il | 🌐 upe.co.il
